summary: Phase 4 HR/Payroll System Testing - Iteration 17. Tested all new features: Seed Data (24 employees, 288+ attendance, 1632 transactions), Payroll Auto (calculate-all, calculate-single, save), AI Employee Performance (analyze, ranking, categories), Payslip Generation (JSON, PDF, Excel). Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Both pages functional - AI Performance shows employee ranking with 36 employees analyzed, Payroll Otomatis shows real calculation results.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 404 for /api/erp-operations/branches and /api/erp-operations/employees endpoints - incorrect API path in frontend (should be /api/erp/employees and /api/global-map/branches)
integration_issues.note: Non-blocking - main functionality works correctly, dropdown filter just doesn't populate

action_items: Optional: Fix frontend API paths in AIPerformance.jsx and PayrollAuto.jsx - change /api/erp-operations/branches to /api/global-map/branches and /api/erp-operations/employees to /api/erp/employees

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Core functionality works, minor dropdown loading issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 HR/Payroll system fully operational. All backend APIs tested and working: /api/seed/all, /api/payroll-auto/calculate/{employee_id}, /api/payroll-auto/calculate-all, /api/ai-employee/analyze/{employee_id}, /api/ai-employee/ranking, /api/payroll-files/payslip/{employee_id}. Frontend pages at /ai-performance and /payroll-auto are functional. The AI categorizes employees into ELITE/SANGAT_BAIK/BAIK/NORMAL/PERLU_PERHATIAN/BURUK based on attendance, sales, and performance metrics.
screenshots_taken: Dashboard after login - OCB AI TITAN with AI Insights
